content:
## Version 1.2.0.10 (Latest, Bug Fix Release)

### Improved
- **Piano Roll Focus Management**: Improved focus handling when editing lyrics and switching between main window and detached piano roll ([PR #2029 by atouu](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/2029)).
- **MainWindow Layout**: Fixed layout issues where the track area could disappear and improved piano roll container sizing.

### Fixed
- **macOS Stability**: Fixed a critical crash on Linux & macOS that occurred when opening the Preferences window due to incompatible ONNX runner settings.
 - **DiffSinger Fix**: Fix mysterious DiffSinger quality debuff that troubles for years([PR #2090 by yqzhishen](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/2090))

## Version 1.2.0.9

### Added
- **N-Way Spectral Morphing (XSY)**: Introduced advanced cross-synthesis support for seamless morphing between multiple voicebank colors.
- **Metronome**: Added a built-in metronome for playback ([PR #2067 by rokujyushi](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/2067)).
- **Playhead Style Preference**: Added a toggle in Preferences to switch between thick gray and thin white playhead lines.
- **Note Hover Effect**: Added visual feedback when hovering over notes in the piano roll.
- **Usage Guide**: Added a direct link to the Usage Guide in the Help menu.
- **Singer Selector Dialog**: New redesigned singer selection dialog with engine grouping, favorites, and search functionality ([PR #2026 by yjzxkxdn](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/2026)).

### Improved
- **DiffSinger Rendering Performance**: Removed global lock that prevented parallel rendering.
- **Rendering Pipeline**: Optimized playback responsiveness and unified rendering logic by removing redundant master adapter checks.

### Fixed
- **Phoneme Display Fix**: Fixed language codes appearing in SynthV-style phonemes when disabled.
- **Pianoroll Window Management**: Fixed window position and size saving for detached piano roll windows, preventing data loss when minimized ([PR #2061 by Cadlaxa](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/2061)).
- **Note Validation**: Fixed `CutOffExceedDurationError` validation logic ([PR #2058 by Cadlaxa](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/2058)).
- **Note Resizing**: Prevented notes from being resized past the start of a part (position < 0).
- **Expression Panel Visual Bug**: Fixed singer portrait bleeding through expression panel ([PR #2046 by yqzhishen](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/2046)).
- **Theme Migration**: Added automatic migration from legacy integer-based theme preference to new string-based theme names ([PR #2045 by AnAndroNerd](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/2045)).

## Version 1.2.0.8

### Added
- **Plugins Manager**: Introduced a new dedicated manager for batch edits and phonemizer plugins, making it easier to discover and install community-made improvements.
- **Voicebank Teams & Projects**: Enhanced the Voicebank Catalog and Package Manager to group singers by their respective teams and provide rich documentation (including Markdown tables support).
- **Singer-Specific Links**: Added separate buttons for Team Websites and specific Singer Pages in the voicebank catalog.

### Fixed
- **Lyric Input Navigation**: Fixed an issue where pressing `Tab` during lyric input would not correctly advance to the next note.

## Version 1.2.0.7

### Added
- **Enhanced Pitch Line Drawing Tool**: Supports drawing Sine Waves and S-Curves using `Alt` and `Ctrl` modifier keys.
- **Apply Pitch From Audio**: Added context menu option to extract and apply F0 pitch from an overlapping `UWavePart` directly to a `UVoicePart` using RMVPE.
- Support for loading external batch edit plugins.

### Improved
- **ONNX Runtime Refactoring**: Introduced `OnnxRunnerChoice` enum to gracefully handle inference API selection (CPU / CoreML) for Game, Vogen, RMVPE, and DiffSinger.
- **CoreML Static Shapes Support**: Enforced static tensor shapes for CoreML ONNX compatibility to prevent model crashes on macOS.
- Optimized `ProgressBarNotification` by setting `InvokeAsync` to background thread.

### Fixed
- **Ustx Version Compatibility**: Reverted default save version to `0.9` while ensuring seamless loading of `0.9.1` projects without version mismatch errors.

### Upstream Commits / PRs Applied
- **PR #2040** by [@cadlaxa](https://github.com/cadlaxa) - Replacements Update: Introduced word boundary logic for multiple phonemizers.
- **PR #2031** by [@maikotattun](https://github.com/maikotattun) - Support Flag Text Input in Note Properties.
- **PR #2029** by [@atouu](https://github.com/atouu) - Pianoroll focus & UI workaround fixes (partially applied due to custom UI changes).
- [`da367bfea2`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/da367bfea2ee1942b89890a1b1da061582e39912) - Modifiable pitch line shape.
- [`65b5c30e67`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/65b5c30e67840724aa14f8d4b09985c06f903f74) - Load external batch edits.
- [`0ddfef9dfd`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/0ddfef9dfd7186f401548b9288b3834aceff6ac5) - Fix error on missing expression.
- [`f22f252bc4`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/f22f252bc47c8f1909a4f307adf033acfe01d08e) - Support force disable session config.
- [`d488eb0bee`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/d488eb0bee98671d8d2878b55745099ef75e83ab) - Disable session config for vogen inference.
- [`042b018abe`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/042b018abee7244b07f9676e765930ed7f6d8cc1) - Introduce execution provider / runner choice enum.
- [`8eb4bdf9c7`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/8eb4bdf9c7df74382e25f2820e711b76d5b3961b) - Add coreml execution provider.
- [`58448ff652`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/58448ff6529b473e95e3cb86fa2d43996695a5db) - Static shape support for coreml.
- [`b3ecf03031`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/b3ecf030312d5dd82a8a3a544ebfa9e1a704174c) - Diffsinger static shapes for coreml.
- [`34e0cfe274`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/34e0cfe274901b0cb92448f0722b96eed168a39e) - Fix RMVPE applying logic for static shapes.
- [`d67074cf5e`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/d67074cf5e79b3a5658d71a5e1cf96003b0fb66d) - Fix coreml disable condition & Require static shapes.
- [`f3d80c1463`](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/commit/f3d80c14632cdbcd779fc1ba251ca653ecfc04c2) - Support applying pitch from arbitrary wave part.

## Version 1.2.0.6

### Added
- Support for **GAME (Audio → MIDI)** for melody extraction from audio.
- **RMVPE (f0 extractor)** support for Audio → MIDI pitch estimation.
- **DiffSinger Retake** shortcut (`Ctrl + Shift + R`).

### Improved
- Audio → MIDI pipeline now supports estimation of **Dynamics**, **Energy**, **Tension**, and **Voicing** directly from audio.

## Version 1.2.0.5

### Added
- Note-Level Attention feature.
- Video recorder and export functionality using FFmpeg.
- Custom UI font support.
- New splash window.
- Split Vocal Part feature.
- Japanese C+V Phonemizer.
- Custom singer theme support (notes, pitch, phonemes, etc.).

### Updated
- SVP parser updated with support for voice groups.

### Improved
- Added margin for vertical scroll playback.
- Integrated Smooth Pitch Shape feature ([PR #1987 by Maiko](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/1987)).

### Fixed
- Fixed stationary cursor behavior.

## Version 1.2.0.4

### Added
- TikTok recording mode ([by keirokeer](https://github.com/keirokeer/OpenUtau-DiffSinger-Lunai/commit/a83d11444453d7c33130ef6d5465b0012f815381)).
- Support for `.ccs` (CeVIO) project format.
- Support for `.tssln` (VoiSona) project format.
- Note opacity configuration.

### Improved
- Wave part editing: trim and fade support ([PR #1968 by Maiko](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/1968)).
- Vibrato Variation and "Randomize pitch deviation" batch edit ([PR #1959 by p4o-a7o](https://github.com/stakira/OpenUtau/pull/1959)).
- Wave parts are no longer restricted by project start
